channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Israel never talked me into the war with Iran,’ Trump says
item.description: US president suggests attacking Iran was his own decision as war struggles to garner public support amid energy crisis.

item.title: Cloud over US-Iran talks: What are the key sticking points?
item.description: Trump announces new talks with Iran as fragile Pakistan-brokered ceasefire raises stakes for future negotiations.

item.title: Tight security in Islamabad as US-Iran talks set to go ahead
item.description: Security is on lockdown in Islamabad where preparations are being made for new US‑Iran talks.

item.title: What we know about the US capture of Iranian vessel near Hormuz
item.description: US releases video showing the capture of Iranian-flagged ship near Hormuz, Trump says it tried to breach its blockade.

item.title: Iran says it has ‘no plans’ for negotiations with the US
item.description: Iran says it has ‘no plans’ for negotiations with the US

item.title: Iraq’s ruling Shia bloc races to choose PM as US, Iran watch
item.description: Ismail Qaani's visit came at the request of PM al-Sudani amid internal divisions in the Shia parliamentary bloc.

item.title: Second round in Islamabad: Who are the main US-Iran negotiators?
item.description: Fresh talks between the US and Iran are uncertain. But these are the key figures who have driven negotiations so far.

item.title: US captures Iranian ship Touska amid mediation efforts: All we know
item.description: The US claims the ship was trying to evade its naval blockade. Iran calls it 'piracy'.

item.title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
item.description: Three boys and five girls, aged between three to 11, were killed in the shooting on Sunday, officials say.

item.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
item.description: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.
